prompt: Analyze approval rates by lender. Show me the top 10 lenders by volume and their approval rates for 2024. Include the number of applications and approvals for each.

assertions.name: sql_file_created
assertions.description: A query.sql file is created with valid SQL syntax

assertions.name: sql_uses_ctes
assertions.description: SQL uses Common Table Expressions (CTEs) for readability

assertions.name: clear_column_aliases
assertions.description: Query uses clear column aliases like num_approved, pct_approved (not generic COUNT(*) as count)

assertions.name: results_have_approval_rate
assertions.description: Results include approval rate percentage for each lender

assertions.name: top_10_lenders
assertions.description: Results show top 10 lenders by volume

assertions.name: summary_report_exists
assertions.description: A summary.txt report is generated with key findings

assertions.name: report_includes_findings
assertions.description: Report includes 3+ key findings (e.g., highest/lowest approval rate, median rate, insights)

assertions.name: report_mentions_file_location
assertions.description: Report specifies where the .sql file was saved
